backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the PROXIIS backend with task management, user profiles, performance stats, authorization, and blob storage mixins. Exposes APIs for creating/completing/verifying tasks, managing user profiles, and fetching leaderboard data.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades stored user profiles from an old schema (missing `tasksPosted`) to a new schema by adding `tasksPosted = 0` to each existing profile.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — the account creation flow gating the profile dashboard, and the dashboard stats panel — to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PROXIIS Vite app, loading the Google Identity Services script, QRCode.js library, and the main React module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level view state (landing/hub/profile) with a neon grid background and a global toast notification provider.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontally scrollable category filter pill bar that toggles selection (deselects on re-click) and applies a green-to-purple gradient to the active pill.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Dialog modal allowing performers to upload a completion photo and creators to verify the task and submit a 1–5 star rating.
frontend/src/components/DashboardStatsPa: Displays a 2x2 grid of stat cards (tasks completed, user rating, total ratings, tasks posted) fetched from the caller's profile, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Horizontally scrollable filter bar with toggle buttons for 'Newest', 'Most Urgent', and 'Highest Paying' task filters.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar for the hub view featuring the app title, an expandable search input, a notifications popover, a leaderboard sheet, and a profile button.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Renders a ranked list of up to 10 users showing their earnings, tasks completed, and average rating, with skeleton loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating a new task, handling title, category, price, location, deadline, photo upload with progress tracking, and submission via the useCreateTask hook.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeDisplay.ts: Generates and displays a UPI payment QR code using a CDN-loaded QRCode library, showing the amount with a 10% platform fee.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Renders a visual star rating component supporting full and half stars up to a configurable maximum.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays a task as a card with photo, category badge, title, location, deadline, and price; opens a TaskDetailsSheet on click, guarding unauthenticated or profile-less users.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: A slide-in sheet component that displays full task details and provides actions (accept, complete, delete, toggle Telegram chat) based on the current user's role (creator, performer, or visitor).
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: A display component that shows a continuously auto-scrolling vertical reel of recently completed campus tasks using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Exports a single UPI_ID constant used for payment processing, intended to be replaced with a real UPI ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: A hook that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, initializes Google Sign-In, and exposes signIn/signOut functions along with decoded user info from the JWT credential.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: A React Query hook that fetches the leaderboard list of user profiles from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: A collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile data (caller profile, stats, UserProfile) via the ICP backend actor, including Google-based profile creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: Exports React Query mutation hooks for task lifecycle actions: assigning a performer, completing a task, verifying a task with a rating, toggling Telegram discussion, and deleting a task.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, searching, and creating tasks via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutation success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark-mode color theme (greens, purples, teals).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions for building Telegram profile links and UPI payment deep links with a 10% platform fee applied.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Utility functions for converting between bigint nanosecond timestamps and datetime-local strings, plus a human-readable deadline formatter.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL/hash query parameters, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the address bar.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main task hub view that displays, filters, and sorts tasks by category/search/sort, and gates task posting behind authentication and profile creation.
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Marketing landing page with a hero section, 'How it Works' steps, and a call-to-action button navigating to the hub view.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: React view component that handles a multi-step onboarding flow (login, profile setup, dashboard) using Internet Identity and Google Sign-In, then displays the authenticated user's profile stats, ratings, and post history.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch), border radii, fonts, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the project's design system.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file that records existing features, pending architectural requests, known issues, and metadata for the PROXIIS app, including profile creation flow and user dashboard stats features.
